prompt: Validate only the integration tests in packages/sources/tiingo/test/integration for EAF quality (TestAdapter, mocks, coverage). Do not review application source code beyond what is needed to understand test intent.
assertions: Primary focus is integration tests (TestAdapter, nock/mocks, adapter responses)—not a full production code review checklist.
Output includes approved (boolean) and rationale (string; empty when passing per skill rules).
References or implies end-to-end adapter entrypoint testing rather than only pure unit helpers.
